# 169 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
jal ra, machine_to_supervisor
machine_to_supervisor:
li t0, 0x80001001
csrw mtvec, t0
li t1, 0x20
csrs sip, t1
li t2, 0x2
csrs sstatus, t2
wfi
csrr x10, scause
j .
# Result: a0 = 5

# 171 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x80000100
ori t0, t0, 0
csrw 0x305, t0          # mtvec (writable CSR)
li t1, 32               # (1 << 5)
csrs 0x304, t1          # mie (valid writable CSR)
li t2, 8                # (1 << 3) set MIE in mstatus
csrs 0x300, t2
addi x0, x0, 0
addi x0, x0, 0
addi x0, x0, 0
addi x0, x0, 0
auipc x10, 0
wfi
# Result: a0 = 0x80000114
